float2 boneWeights = Input.BoneWeights;

float4x3 localToWorldMatrix = FetchBoneMatrix(boneIndex);
float3 outTangent3 = mul(float4(Input.Tangent.xyz, 0.0f), localToWorldMatrix).xyz;
